message:
feat(connectors): credential-ID auth, path encoding, delta URL safety, and webhook expansion

Matrix: add credential-ID header support, redact access_token in Debug,
add RequestBuilder auth helper, expand sync/send/state operations.

Mattermost: encode all path segments with percent_encoding to prevent
injection. Add get_user, list_teams, expanded thread support.

Microsoft365: fix delta sync to URL-encode delta tokens via query_pairs_mut
instead of string interpolation (prevents query string injection). Add test.

Teams: major expansion with thread reply, file attachment, channel
management, and adaptive card operations.

WhatsApp: expand webhook with message status callbacks, delivery receipts,
and read receipt handling. Add template message support in client.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

+hex.workspace = true
